brand.name: Heita
brand.tagline: Ukunyaniseka, imiyalezo, kunye neendawo zokusebenza ze-AI kwinkqubo enye eqala kwiselula.

landing.intro: I-Heita inika abathengisi namashishini amancinci indlela ethe ngqo kubathengi babo — nge-WhatsApp, i-QR, kunye ne-app ekhawulezayo efakekayo esebenza ngeedatha ezisetyenziswa ngabantu baseMzantsi Afrika.

features.joinDescription: Iikhowudi ze-QR evenkileni, kumarisithi, kwiithegi zemveliso, kumyalezo we-WhatsApp, okanye kwisixhumanisi esithe ngqo — yonke into ihla kwiprofayile yeshishini efanayo.
features.messagingDescription: I-SMS, i-WhatsApp, i-push, kunye nezaziso zangaphakathi zidibana kumgca omnye womthengi, zilawulwa liqela lakho.
features.aiDescription: Ivenkile nganye ifundisa i-AI ngamaxwebhu ayo, iikhathalogu, ii-FAQ, kunye nemigaqo. I-Ollama ngokwendalo, emva koko i-cloud fallback xa kuyimfuneko.
features.loyaltyDescription: Amanqanaba, imivuzo, izikhuthazi, iimali zokubhalisa, nezikhumbuzi zeziganeko, konke kudibene kwi-wallet enye onokuyithwala kuyo nayiphi na indawo.
features.pwaDescription: Iyafakeka, isebenza nangaphandle konxibelelwano, kwaye iyakhawuleza ngeedatha ezisetyenziswa ngabantu baseMzantsi Afrika. Akukho kuvalelwa kwi-app store.
features.trustDescription: Ukuqinisekiswa kwe-webhook ye-WhatsApp, ii-OTP ezinemida, i-CSP evaliweyo, kunye nokwahlulwa kwabaqeshi ngemithetho yamarowu.

auth.signInBlurb: Sikhupha iikhowudi zokungena kuphela kwiinombolo zefowuni eziqinisekisiweyo. Abathengi abatsha mabakhe iakhawunti kuqala.
auth.signUpBlurb: Siqinisekisa inombolo yakho yefowuni ngaphambi kokudala iakhawunti ukuze ii-SIM ezisetyenziswe kwakhona zingathathi ubuwena ngokufihlakeleyo.
auth.providerSuffix: Ukungena nge-Google ne-Apple kuvela ngokuzenzekelayo xa kusetelwe.
auth.footerSecurity: Inemida · I-HMAC ityikityiwe · Iphela kwimizuzu eli-10
auth.errorOAuthEmailMissing: Iakhawunti yakho ye-Google okanye ye-Apple ayabelananga nge-imeyili. Ngena ngenombolo yakho yefowuni endaweni yoko.
auth.errorAccountDeactivated: Le akhawunti ivaliwe. Qhagamshelana no-support@heita.co.za ukuba ucinga ukuba le yimpazamo.
auth.errorOAuthAccountLinkRequired: Iakhawunti sele ikhona ngale imeyili. Ngena kuqala ngefowuni yakho uze uqhagamshele i-Google okanye i-Apple kwiprofayile yakho.

home.summarySingle: Ulilungu leshishini elinye, unamanqaku ali-{points} kwi-wallet yakho.
home.summaryPlural: Ulilungu kumashishini angu-{count}, unamanqaku ali-{points} kwi-wallet yakho.
home.searchPlaceholder: Fumana ishishini ngegama, indawo, okanye udidi…
home.discoveryMatches: {count, plural, =0 {0 ezifanayo} one {1 efanayo} other {# ezifanayo}}
home.noResults: Akukho mashishini oluntu afanise olu phando. Zama udidi okanye indawo.
home.emptyBody: Skena ikhowudi ye-QR evenkileni ethatha inxaxheba, vula isixhumanisi sokujoyina se-WhatsApp, okanye ucofe iqhosha lokujoyina kwiprofayile yeshishini ukuze uqale ukufumana amanqaku.

wallet.totalPoints: Amanqaku ewonke kumashishini angu-{count, plural, one {#} other {#}}
wallet.emptyBody: Joyina ishishini ukuze ubone amanqaku nemivuzo yakho apha.

notifications.title: Uhlaziyo lwakutshanje
notifications.blurb: Ukuphuculwa kwenqanaba, ukuhlengwa, izikhumbuzi zemicimbi, neempendulo zebhothi zibonakala apha.

profile.dangerBody: Ukucima iakhawunti yakho ngoku kuqala ixesha leentsuku ezingama-30 lokucima, kukhansele ubulungu obusebenzayo, kwaye kurhoxise iimvume ezisebenzayo.

profileSettings.title: Iisetingi zeakhawunti
profileSettings.downloadStarted: Ukuhanjiswa kokukhutshelwa kwedatha yeakhawunti yakho kuqalile.
profileSettings.downloadError: Asikwazanga ukulungiselela ukukhutshelwa kwedatha yeakhawunti yakho.
profileSettings.confirmDelete: Cima iakhawunti yakho ye-Heita? Oku kuya kurhoxisa ubulungu obusebenzayo kwaye kuqale inkqubo yokucima.

notificationPreferences.title: Izicwangciso zezaziso
notificationPreferences.description: Khetha ukuba leliphi ishishini elinokusebenzisa amajelo athile xa lithumela uhlaziyo kuwe. Iiyure zoxolo zimisa i-push ne-imeyili, kodwa umjelo wangaphakathi kwi-app usahlala ukhoyo.
notificationPreferences.emptyState: Joyina ishishini ukuze ulawule izicwangciso zezaziso zeshishini ngalinye.

quietHours.enabled: Misa i-push ne-imeyili ngexesha leeyure zoxolo

cookieConsent.title: Ukhetho lweekuki
cookieConsent.body: I-Heita isebenzisa iikuki eziyimfuneko ukuze ungene, kukhuselwe ukhuseleko, kwaye kuqhubeke iseshoni. Ungakhetha ukuba sivunyelwe na ukusebenzisa iikuki ezingeyomfuneko kuhlalutyo lwexesha elizayo nasekuphuculeni imveliso.

businessProfile.joinPrompt: Ngena, joyina, uze uqale ukuqokelela rhoqo xa undwendwela.

dashboard.heroBlurb: Lawula ukunyaniseka, iingxoxo, ne-AI kwindawo enye.
dashboard.activitySummary: Kutshintshelwe imiyalezo engu-{messages} iyonke · kuqoshwe iintengiselwano zokunyaniseka ezingu-{transactions}.

promotions.title: Izikhuthazi
promotions.subtitle: Cwangcisa amaphulo asenexesha elinqunyiweyo, iikhowudi, kunye nokusasazwa okujolise emanqanabeni — kuya kubonakala kwizaziso zabathengi bakho.
promotions.broadcastDescription: Ukusasaza kuthumela esi sikhuthazi njengesaziso kuwo wonke amalungu afanelekayo. Khangela abaphulaphuli phambi kokuthumela — akukho kubuyela emva.
promotions.emptyState: Akukho zikhuthazi okwangoku. Dala iphulo lakho lokuqala ngentla.
promotions.noTiers: Akukho manqanaba okunyaniseka asekiweyo kweli shishini.
promotions.tierTargetsHint: Yishiye ingenanto ukuze ithunyelwe kuwo onke amalungu asebenzayo. Khetha amanqanaba ukunciphisa abaphulaphuli.

events.title: Iziganeko
events.subtitle: Cwangcisa iziganeko zevenkile, ukubhengezwa, kunye neentlanganiso. Izikhumbuzi zihamba nge-WhatsApp, push, kunye nohlelo.
events.emptyUpcoming: Akukho ziganeko zizayo. Cwangcisa eyokuqala apha ngentla.

publicEvents.title: Okuzayo
publicEvents.subtitle: Izikhumbuzi zithunyelwa ngosuku olungaphambili nge-WhatsApp, push, kunye nomjelo we-app.

receiptHistory.title: Imbali yamanqaku nokuhlangula
receiptHistory.subtitle: Jonga yonke intengiselwano yokunyaniseka yale shishini uze uyikhuphele xa ufuna irekhodi elicacileyo.
